violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was obstructed by boxes and a bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of Person in charge, shrimp was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Shrimp was 58 DF, shrimp was made at 12pm, shrimp was moved to shallow pans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
ROP packaged Tuna was observed thawing in an intact ROP package. Establishment removed fish from package. Tuna was observed at 28DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the first prep unit on the serving line. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2026
The tile floor by the back door is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by buckets. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Crab meat was observed thawing in an intact reduced oxy sealed package. Fish product in reduced oxygen package must be removed from package before defrosting. Crab meat was observed at 33 degrees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024
